task_completion.description: Verify the Persistent Shopping Cart general settings are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Magento Admin under Stores > Configuration > Customers > Persistent Shopping Cart, the following dropdowns should be set: 'Enable Persistence' to 'Yes', 'Enable "Remember Me"' to 'Yes', 'Clear Persistence on Sign Out' to 'No', and 'Persist Shopping Cart' to 'Yes'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Persistence Lifetime is set to exactly 30 days in seconds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Persistent Shopping Cart settings, the 'Persistence Lifetime (seconds)' input field must contain the exact value '2592000'. The 'Use system value' checkbox next to it must be unchecked.

task_completion.description: Verify Guest Subscription for Newsletters is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under Stores > Configuration > Customers > Newsletter, the 'Allow Guest Subscription' dropdown must be set to 'Yes'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Contact Us recipient email is updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under Stores > Configuration > General > Contacts, the 'Send Emails To' input field must contain 'support@luma.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Wishlist functionality is completely disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under Stores > Configuration > Customers > Wishlist, the 'Enabled' dropdown must be set to 'No'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the configuration changes were successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A green success banner reading 'You saved the configuration.' should be visible at the top of the Magento Admin panel after clicking the 'Save Config' button.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Magento Admin GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating through the Magento Admin panel menus (Stores > Configuration) and interacting with form fields, rather than using terminal commands (like bin/magento config:set) to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual web browser and Magento application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should display a standard web browser interface loaded with the Magento 2 Admin panel, not a text editor or a mocked HTML file.

integrity.description: Verify the save action was performed genuinely via the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen clicking the 'Save Config' button in the top right corner of the configuration page, resulting in a standard Magento success message, rather than editing the page DOM to fake a success message.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct 'Persistence Lifetime (seconds)' value is exactly 2592000 (calculated as 30 days * 24 hours * 60 minutes * 60 seconds). The correct 'Contact Us' recipient email ('Send Emails To') is 'support@luma.com'.
